title: Create a green cube button widget with counter

input.description:
# Task Metadata

## Task ID
task 3

## Action
Create a green cube button widget with counter

## Stack
Flutter

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: False

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Summary
Create `test/green_cube_button.dart` with a StatefulWidget `GreenCubeButton`. 80x80 green square. Each tap increments an internal counter displayed as white text in the center. No external dependencies. Tester is the last agent.

artifacts.implementation_plan:
# Implementation Plan: Create Green Cube Button Widget with Counter

## Task
Create a Flutter StatefulWidget named `GreenCubeButton`.

## Target File
`test/green_cube_button.dart`

## Requirements
- Widget class: `GreenCubeButton` extends `StatefulWidget` with `_GreenCubeButtonState`
- An 80x80 square using `BoxDecoration` with `color: Colors.green`
- Internal `int _count = 0` state variable
- Each tap calls `setState` to increment `_count`
- Centered white `Text` displaying current `_count`
- N
